narrative.description: Imagic's rescue shooter sends pilots across a lunar surface to extract stranded miners while evading subsurface alien craft, blending horizontal scrolling combat with timed extraction objectives.
narrative.core_loop: Fly low over moon sectors, destroy alien threats, land on miner beacons to rescue crew, and escape before fuel runs out.

mechanics.map_notes: Each sector requires landing on miner beacons to rescue crew before advancing.
mechanics.expression: Each sector requires landing on miner beacons to rescue crew before advancing.

mechanics.map_notes: Ground-hugging flight over a scrolling lunar surface with scaling depth cues.
mechanics.expression: Ground-hugging flight over a scrolling lunar surface with scaling depth cues.

mechanics.map_notes: Multiple moon sectors escalate enemy density and rescue quotas.
mechanics.expression: Multiple moon sectors escalate enemy density and rescue quotas.

mechanics.map_notes: Ship hull depletes from impacts and alien fire.
mechanics.expression: Ship hull depletes from impacts and alien fire.

mechanics.map_notes: Extra lives earned at score milestones.
mechanics.expression: Extra lives earned at score milestones.

mechanics.map_notes: Forward laser fires without charge delay.
mechanics.expression: Forward laser fires without charge delay.

mechanics.map_notes: Surface terrain and subsurface aliens constrain safe flight paths.
mechanics.expression: Surface terrain and subsurface aliens constrain safe flight paths.

mechanics.map_notes: Alien craft emerge with spreading bullet patterns.
mechanics.expression: Alien craft emerge with spreading bullet patterns.

mechanics.map_notes: Burrowing enemies telegraph emergence with ground ripples.
mechanics.expression: Burrowing enemies telegraph emergence with ground ripples.

mechanics.map_notes: Sector guardians follow repeating dive-bomb cycles.
mechanics.expression: Sector guardians follow repeating dive-bomb cycles.

mechanics.map_notes: Late sectors introduce multi-part guardian encounters.
mechanics.expression: Late sectors introduce multi-part guardian encounters.

mechanics.map_notes: Clearing a sector saves rescue progress for the next attempt.
mechanics.expression: Clearing a sector saves rescue progress for the next attempt.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Moonsweeper through its core shooter loop.
